# Direct Poster Brief

We ran a viability screen across a panel of oncology cell lines and a small set
of targeted compounds at matched doses. We are sharing the historical response
data for the observed experiments and a holdout screen with the response values
removed. The goal is to predict normalized drug-response AUC for the held-out
compound and cell-line combinations as accurately as possible.

Submissions should be one CSV row per holdout experiment. We want a prediction
for each holdout id, and the best predictions against the held-out AUC values
should win.
